title: Buckwheat Bowties
description: A kid-friendly Italian dish featuring bowtie pasta made from buckwheat, poached and served with a touch of bitterness for added flavor.
instructions: Place the buckwheat bowties in a pot.
Add chicken broth and water to cover the pasta by about an inch.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer gently for about 10-12 minutes or until tender.
Flake the cooked buckwheat with a fork into the liquid to form a creamy texture.
Season with garlic powder if using, and adjust seasoning as needed.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
